prompt: In RC-BL-02, the section on checkbox syntax says to use [variable___1] but that's wrong — the correct format in REDCap is [variable(1)] with parentheses, not triple underscores. Please fix it.

assertions.text: The skill reads the original article before making any changes
assertions.check: summary.txt references RC-BL-02 and its content

assertions.text: The skill identifies that no correction is needed (article already correct)
assertions.check: summary.txt explains that the article already uses correct syntax with parentheses, not triple underscores

assertions.text: No unnecessary changes are made to the article
assertions.check: Output article is functionally identical to the original (or only trivially different)

assertions.text: The skill communicates clearly why no edit was made
assertions.check: summary.txt contains an explanation the user would understand, not just 'no change needed'
